goal: is_normal_subgroup[G](s) = forall(x0: G, x1: G) { s.contains(x1) implies s.contains(x0 * x1 * x0.inverse) }
proof: function[T0: Group](x0: Subgroup[T0]) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T0) { not x2 ∈ x0 or x1 * x2 * x1.inverse ∈ x0 } = is_normal_subgroup[T0](x0) }[G](s)
is_normal_subgroup[G](s)
n ∈ s
(forall(x0: G, x1: G) { not x1 ∈ s or x0 * x1 * x0.inverse ∈ s } = true)
function(x0: G) { forall(x1: G) { not x1 ∈ s or x0 * x1 * x0.inverse ∈ s } = true }(g)
function(x0: G, x1: G) { not (x0 ∈ s and not x1 * x0 * x1.inverse ∈ s) }(n, g)
function[T0: Group](x0: T0) { x0 * x0.inverse = T0.1 }[G](a)
function[T0: Group](x0: Subgroup[T0], x1: T0, x2: T0) { x1 * x2.inverse ∈ x0 = normal_subgroup_rel[T0](x0, x1, x2) }[G](s, a, a)
function[T0: Group](x0: Subgroup[T0], x1: T0, x2: T0) { x1 * x2.inverse ∈ x0 = normal_subgroup_rel[T0](x0, x1, x2) }[G](s, a, b)
function[T0: Group](x0: Subgroup[T0], x1: T0, x2: T0) { x1 * x2.inverse ∈ x0 = normal_subgroup_rel[T0](x0, x1, x2) }[G](s, b, a)

goal: a * b.inverse * (b * c.inverse) = a * (b.inverse * b) * c.inverse
proof: function[T0: lib(semigroup).Semigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0 * x1 * x2 = x0 * (x1 * x2) }[G](a * b.inverse, b, c.inverse)
function[T0: lib(semigroup).Semigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0 * x1 * x2 = x0 * (x1 * x2) }[G](a, b.inverse, b)
function[T0: Group](x0: T0) { x0.inverse * x0 = T0.1 }[G](b)
function[T0: lib(semigroup).Semigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0 * x1 * x2 = x0 * (x1 * x2) }[G](a, G.1, c.inverse)
function[T0: lib(monoid).Monoid](x0: T0) { T0.1 * x0 = x0 }[G](c.inverse)
function[T0: Group](x0: Subgroup[T0], x1: T0, x2: T0) { x1 * x2.inverse ∈ x0 = normal_subgroup_rel[T0](x0, x1, x2) }[G](s, a, b)
function[T0: Group](x0: Subgroup[T0], x1: T0, x2: T0) { x1 * x2.inverse ∈ x0 = normal_subgroup_rel[T0](x0, x1, x2) }[G](s, b, c)
function[T0: Group](x0: Subgroup[T0], x1: T0, x2: T0) { x1 * x2.inverse ∈ x0 = normal_subgroup_rel[T0](x0, x1, x2) }[G](s, a, c)
function[T0](x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool) { forall(x1: T0) { x0(x1, x1) } = is_reflexive[T0](x0) }[G](normal_subgroup_rel[G](s))
let w0: G satisfy { not normal_subgroup_rel(s, w0, w0) }
function[T0: Group](x0: Subgroup[T0], x1: T0) { normal_subgroup_rel[T0](x0, x1, x1) }[G](s, w0)
function[T0](x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T0) { not x0(x1, x2) or x0(x2, x1) } = is_symmetric[T0](x0) }[G](normal_subgroup_rel[G](s))
let w0: G satisfy { exists(k0: G) { normal_subgroup_rel(s, w0, k0) and not normal_subgroup_rel(s, k0, w0) } }
let w1: G satisfy { normal_subgroup_rel(s, w0, w1) and not normal_subgroup_rel(s, w1, w0) }
function[T0: Group](x0: Subgroup[T0], x1: T0, x2: T0) { not normal_subgroup_rel[T0](x0, x1, x2) or normal_subgroup_rel[T0](x0, x2, x1) }[G](s, w0, w1)
let w0: G satisfy { exists(k0: G, k1: G) { normal_subgroup_rel(s, w0, k0) and normal_subgroup_rel(s, k0, k1) and not normal_subgroup_rel(s, w0, k1) } }
let w1: G satisfy { exists(k2: G) { normal_subgroup_rel(s, w0, w1) and normal_subgroup_rel(s, w1, k2) and not normal_subgroup_rel(s, w0, k2) } }
function[T0](x0: T0) { lib(functions).identity_fn[T0](x0) = x0 }[G](w1)
let w2: G satisfy { normal_subgroup_rel(s, w0, w1) and normal_subgroup_rel(s, w1, w2) and not normal_subgroup_rel(s, w0, w2) }

function[T0: Group](x0: Subgroup[T0], x1: T0, x2: T0, x3: T0) { not normal_subgroup_rel[T0](x0, x1, x2) or not normal_subgroup_rel[T0](x0, x2, x3) or normal_subgroup_rel[T0](x0, x1, x3) }[G](s, w0, lib(functions).identity_fn(w1), w2)

goal: a * b * (ap * bp).inverse = a * b * (bp.inverse * ap.inverse)
proof: bp.inverse * ap.inverse != (ap * bp).inverse

goal: a * b * (bp.inverse * ap.inverse) = a * b * bp.inverse * ap.inverse
proof: function[T0: lib(semigroup).Semigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0 * x1 * x2 = x0 * (x1 * x2) }[G](a * b, bp.inverse, ap.inverse)
function[T0: Group](x0: T0) { x0.inverse * x0 = T0.1 }[G](a)

goal: a * b * bp.inverse * ap.inverse = a * (b * bp.inverse) * (a.inverse * a) * ap.inverse
proof: function[T0: lib(semigroup).Semigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0 * x1 * x2 = x0 * (x1 * x2) }[G](a, b, bp.inverse)
function[T0: lib(semigroup).Semigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0 * x1 * x2 = x0 * (x1 * x2) }[G](a * (b * bp.inverse), a.inverse * a, ap.inverse)
function[T0: lib(monoid).Monoid](x0: T0) { T0.1 * x0 = x0 }[G](ap.inverse)

goal: a * (b * bp.inverse) * (a.inverse * a) * ap.inverse = a * (b * bp.inverse) * a.inverse * (a * ap.inverse)
proof: function[T0: lib(semigroup).Semigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0 * x1 * x2 = x0 * (x1 * x2) }[G](a * (b * bp.inverse) * a.inverse, a, ap.inverse)
function[T0: lib(semigroup).Semigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0 * x1 * x2 = x0 * (x1 * x2) }[G](a * (b * bp.inverse), a.inverse, a)
function[T0: Group](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0 * x1.inverse * (x1 * x2.inverse) = x0 * x2.inverse }[G](a * (b * bp.inverse), a, ap)
function[T0: lib(semigroup).Semigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0 * x1 * x2 = x0 * (x1 * x2) }[G](a, b, bp.inverse)
function[T0: Group](x0: Subgroup[T0], x1: T0, x2: T0) { x1 * x2.inverse ∈ x0 = normal_subgroup_rel[T0](x0, x1, x2) }[G](s, a, ap)
is_normal_subgroup[G](s) and normal_subgroup_rel(s, a, ap)
not normal_subgroup_rel(s, a, ap)
function[T0: Group](x0: Subgroup[T0], x1: T0, x2: T0) { x1 * x2.inverse ∈ x0 = normal_subgroup_rel[T0](x0, x1, x2) }[G](s, b, bp)
normal_subgroup_rel(s, b, bp)
not normal_subgroup_rel(s, b, bp)
not b * bp.inverse ∈ s or not is_normal_subgroup[G](s)
not is_normal_subgroup[G](s)
is_normal_subgroup[G](s) and normal_subgroup_rel(s, a, ap)
not a * (b * bp.inverse) * a.inverse ∈ s or not a * ap.inverse ∈ s
not a * (b * bp.inverse) * a.inverse ∈ s
a * (b * bp.inverse) * a.inverse * (a * ap.inverse) ∈ s
function[T0: Group](x0: Subgroup[T0], x1: T0, x2: T0) { x1 * x2.inverse ∈ x0 = normal_subgroup_rel[T0](x0, x1, x2) }[G](s, a * b, ap * bp)
normal_subgroup_rel(s, b, bp)
is_normal_subgroup[G](s) and normal_subgroup_rel(s, a, ap)
not a * b * (ap * bp).inverse ∈ s
a * b * (ap * bp).inverse ∈ s
function[T0: Group](x0: Subgroup[T0], x1: T0, x2: T0) { x1 * x2.inverse ∈ x0 = normal_subgroup_rel[T0](x0, x1, x2) }[G](s, b, a)
function[T0: Group](x0: Subgroup[T0], x1: T0, x2: T0) { not normal_subgroup_rel[T0](x0, x1, x2) or normal_subgroup_rel[T0](x0, x2, x1) }[G](s, a, b)
normal_subgroup_rel(s, a, b)
not normal_subgroup_rel(s, b, a)
normal_subgroup_rel(s, b, a)
not b * a.inverse ∈ s or not is_normal_subgroup[G](s)
not is_normal_subgroup[G](s)

goal: b.inverse * (b * a.inverse) * b = b.inverse * b * a.inverse * b
proof: function[T0: lib(semigroup).Semigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0 * x1 * x2 = x0 * (x1 * x2) }[G](b.inverse, b, a.inverse)
b.inverse * b * a.inverse != b.inverse * (b * a.inverse)
function[T0: Group](x0: T0) { x0.inverse * x0 = T0.1 }[G](b)

goal: b.inverse * b * a.inverse * b = a.inverse * b
proof: function[T0: lib(monoid).Monoid](x0: T0) { T0.1 * x0 = x0 }[G](a.inverse)
b.inverse * b * a.inverse != a.inverse
b.inverse * (b * a.inverse) * b != a.inverse * b
b.inverse * (b * a.inverse) * b = a.inverse * b
b.inverse.inverse != b
not a.inverse * b ∈ s
function[T0: Group](x0: Subgroup[T0], x1: T0, x2: T0) { x1 * x2.inverse ∈ x0 = normal_subgroup_rel[T0](x0, x1, x2) }[G](s, a.inverse, b.inverse)
is_normal_subgroup[G](s)
normal_subgroup_rel(s, a, b)
not a.inverse * b.inverse.inverse ∈ s
a.inverse * b.inverse.inverse ∈ s
